subject: Status review: mainecoon milestone in South Asia | Frida Kahlo | Q1 review | INIT-5453
body: Following yesterday's call, the mainecoon effort in South Asia needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Alan Turing seems to disagree with Frida Kahlo on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-5453. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: ops, coffee.
